en_title: Sesame Street Movie in the Works at Netflix Following Bidding War
cn_title: Netflix据称赢得《芝麻街》电影改编权
subtitle: Netflix拿下童年回忆
opus_summary: Netflix据称在竞标中击败环球影业，拿下《芝麻街》电影改编权，由Rideback与芝麻街工作室联合制作。艾摩、大鸟等角色细节未公布，导演未定，上映遥遥无期。Netflix去年已签下《芝麻街》新剧集协议。

paragraphs.en: Netflix has reportedly secured the rights for a Sesame Street movie following a bidding war with Universal Pictures.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，Netflix在与环球影业的竞标战后，已获得了《芝麻街》电影改编权。

paragraphs.en: A movie based on the classic children's show will officially join the streamer's growing library of content after it picked up the rights for a film from Sesame Workshop, according to The Hollywood Reporter and as first reported on by The InSneider . Live-action Lilo and Stitch and Aladdin production company Rideback, which was founded by Dan Lin before he joined Netflix as its head of film in 2024 , will produce the project alongside Sesame Workshop.
paragraphs.cn: 据《好莱坞报道者》引述The InSneider的消息，Netflix从芝麻街工作室手中拿下电影改编权后，这部基于经典儿童节目的电影将正式加入该流媒体平台日益丰富的内容库。曾制作《星际宝贝》和《阿拉丁》真人版的Rideback将与芝麻街工作室共同制作该项目。Rideback由Dan Lin创立，他在2024年加入Netflix担任电影主管。

paragraphs.en: Details regarding how beloved characters like Elmo, Big Bird, and Cookie Monster might fit into a feature-length Sesame Street movie have yet to be revealed. It seems a release date is still a ways off, too, as no filmmaker has been attached to the film.
paragraphs.cn: 关于艾摩、大鸟和甜饼怪等深受喜爱的角色将如何融入一部长篇《芝麻街》电影，具体细节尚未公布。看样子，上映日期也还很遥远，因为目前还没有导演加入这个项目。

paragraphs.en: The Hollywood Reporter says the bidding war first began with Netflix, Universal Pictures, and Warner Bros., with Warner Bros. taking an early exit when drama surrounding its impending acquisition started to heat up . Rideback's plan for a Sesame Street movie helped win Sesame Workshop over with Netflix, but it doesn't sound like it was an easy fight.
paragraphs.cn: 据《好莱坞报道者》称，竞标战最初在Netflix、环球影业和华纳兄弟之间展开，但华纳兄弟因收购闹剧升温而早早退出。Rideback为《芝麻街》电影制定的方案帮助Netflix赢得了芝麻街工作室的青睐，但听起来这并非一场轻松的较量。

paragraphs.en: Before Universal tapped out, it had promised that Everything, Everywhere, All at Once directors Daniel Kwan and Daniel Scheinert were in its corner as producers. The Lego Movie masterminds Phil Lord and Chris Miller were also said to be involved as producers with its side of the deal. The Hollywood Reporter's sources say neither duo was ever attached to direct.
paragraphs.cn: 在环球影业退出前，它曾承诺《瞬息全宇宙》的导演关家永和丹尼尔·施纳特会以制片人身份加盟。而《乐高大电影》的主创Phil Lord和Chris Miller据称也会以制片人身份参与环球的交易。不过，《好莱坞报道者》的消息源称，这两组搭档都从未被安排担任导演。

paragraphs.en: Netflix's involvement in a Sesame Street movie makes even more sense considering the streamer struck a deal to bring new episodes of the show to its platform last year . Meanwhile, this isn't the first time Sesame Workshop has tried to bring a new movie to life in the last 14 years. One project was announced in 2012 , and another was mentioned in 2016 .
paragraphs.cn: 考虑到Netflix去年已与芝麻街工作室达成协议，将把《芝麻街》新剧集引入其平台，它参与《芝麻街》电影就更顺理成章了。另外，这也并非芝麻街工作室在过去14年里首次尝试制作新电影。一个项目在2012年公布，另一个在2016年被提及。
